Metadata.title: MOTD — Mukhawar of the Day
Metadata.description: Mukhawar of the Day — UAE/GCC marketplace for ready-made clothes and custom tailoring

HomePage.title: MOTD — Mukhawar of the Day
HomePage.description: Mukhawar of the Day — UAE/GCC marketplace for ready-made clothes and custom tailoring.

HeroSection.body: We curate exceptional embroidered fabrics from trusted tailors across the Emirates — transforming a months-long journey into a seamless, considered experience.

FabricDetail.partnerNote: Fabric sold and picked up from this MOTD partner store.

DesignDetail.partnerNote: Custom order will be tailored and fulfilled by this MOTD partner shop.

PremiumFabrics.title: Premium Fabrics
PremiumFabrics.emptyFilter: No fabrics match this material. Try another filter.

TailorsSection.title: Meet the Tailors
TailorsSection.description: Discover the Emirates' most celebrated master tailors, preserving centuries-old heritage through exceptional craftsmanship
TailorsSection.viewAll: View All Master Tailors of the UAE

TailorsListing.title: Master Tailors of the UAE
TailorsListing.description: Browse approved tailor shops across the Emirates. Each atelier offers bespoke designs you can order through our custom tailoring flow.
TailorsListing.empty: There are no approved tailor shops available right now. Please check back soon.

CustomOrderCheckout.title: Checkout
CustomOrderCheckout.description: Enter your UAE delivery address and confirm your custom order. Payment is cash on delivery only.
CustomOrderCheckout.incompleteDraft: Your order is incomplete. Please finish the configurator steps first.
CustomOrderCheckout.codDescription: Pay when your order is delivered.
CustomOrderCheckout.applePayDescription: Pay securely with Apple Pay on supported devices.
CustomOrderCheckout.applePayUnavailable: Apple Pay is not available on this device yet. On your iPhone: open the Wallet app → add a debit/credit card → make sure Apple Pay is enabled. Then reopen this page in Safari (not Chrome or WhatsApp).
CustomOrderCheckout.applePayNotConfigured: Apple Pay is not available yet. Payment setup is still in progress.
CustomOrderCheckout.ownFabricPickupNote: For own-fabric orders, this address is also used for fabric pickup coordination.
CustomOrderCheckout.submitError: Unable to place order. Please try again.
CustomOrderCheckout.agreeToTerms: By placing this order you agree to our terms.
CustomOrderCheckout.confirmMeasurementsLabel: I hereby confirm that all the provided measurements are correct.
CustomOrderCheckout.successMessage: Your custom tailoring order has been placed successfully.

pricingNotReady.generic: Pricing not available. Please try again.

CustomOrderReview.title: Review Your Order
CustomOrderReview.description: Confirm your selections and review the itemized price breakdown before checkout.
CustomOrderReview.incompleteDraft: Your order is incomplete. Please finish the earlier configurator steps.
CustomOrderReview.pricingError: Unable to calculate price. Please try again.

CustomOrderMeasurements.title: Your Measurements
CustomOrderMeasurements.description: Enter garment measurements using the same fields as our thobe measurement guide. All fields are optional — you can refine these with your tailor later.
CustomOrderMeasurements.optionalNote: All fields are optional. Measurements are in inches. Each input matches a numbered point on the measurement guide.
CustomOrderMeasurements.zoomHint: Click the image to activate the zoom lens. Drag to inspect labels and measurement points.

fields.totalLengthHint: Point 10 — shoulder to hem along the side
fields.shoulderWidthHint: Point 1 — across the shoulders from seam to seam
fields.armLengthHint: Point 7 — along the outer edge of the sleeve
fields.chestWidthHint: Point 4 — side seam at chest level
fields.waistHint: Point 5 — side seam at waist level
fields.hipsHint: Point 6 — side seam at hip level
fields.sleeveOpeningWidthHint: Point 8 — cuff opening on the dress
fields.cuffWidthHint: Point 11 — cuff width on the sleeve detail
fields.cuffLengthHint: Point 12 — sleeve width at the marked point on the sleeve detail
fields.notesPlaceholder: Any fit preferences or special instructions for your tailor

CustomOrderMeters.title: Fabric Meters
CustomOrderMeters.description: Enter how many meters of fabric you need. We've suggested an amount based on your chosen design — adjust if needed.
CustomOrderMeters.descriptionMulti: Pair each design with a fabric and set the meters required for that garment.
CustomOrderMeters.inputHint: Enter a value between 2 and 7 meters.
CustomOrderMeters.validationError: Fabric meters must be between 2 and 7.
CustomOrderMeters.ownFabricNote: You're using your own fabric. This amount helps your tailor plan the work; no platform fabric cost applies.
CustomOrderMeters.platformFabricNote: Fabric cost at checkout is calculated per meter using your selected platform fabric.
CustomOrderMeters.pairingHint: You selected multiple fabrics and/or designs. Add each design–fabric pair below and set meters for each item.
CustomOrderMeters.noItemsYet: No items added yet. Use the form below to build your order.

CustomOrderTailor.title: Choose a Design
CustomOrderTailor.description: Select an approved tailor shop and pick the design style for your custom garment.
CustomOrderTailor.descriptionMulti: Select one or more designs. You can combine them with different fabrics in the next steps.
CustomOrderTailor.crossStepFabrics: Fabrics you selected ({count}) — add more designs below
CustomOrderTailor.emptyDesigns: This tailor has no designs available yet.

CustomOrderFabric.title: Choose Your Fabric
CustomOrderFabric.description: Select a fabric from our partner stores, or choose to use your own fabric for this custom order.
CustomOrderFabric.descriptionMulti: Select one or more fabrics. You can pair each with different designs in the next steps.
CustomOrderFabric.crossStepDesigns: Designs you selected ({count}) — add matching fabrics below
CustomOrderFabric.platformOptionDescription: Browse MOTD partner fabrics. Price is calculated per meter at checkout.
CustomOrderFabric.ownFabricOptionDescription: You supply the fabric. No platform fabric cost is added to your order.
CustomOrderFabric.ownFabricConfirmedTitle: You will use your own fabric
CustomOrderFabric.ownFabricConfirmedDescription: Continue to choose your tailor and design. Fabric cost will not be included in your order total.

TailorDetail.designsEmpty: No designs available from this tailor yet.

MeasurementGuide.title: Measure with Confidence
MeasurementGuide.description: Follow our simple guide to get accurate measurements for a perfectly tailored garment.

tip1.title: Use a Soft Measuring Tape
tip1.desc: Keep tape snug but not tight, parallel to the floor.

tip2.title: Stand Naturally
tip2.desc: Feet together, arms at sides, body relaxed.

tip3.title: Double Check Key Areas
tip3.desc: Match the guide: length, shoulder, chest, waist, hip width, and sleeve details.

TailorRegister.title: Tailor Registration
TailorRegister.description: Create your tailor account to list your shop and designs on MOTD. Your application will be reviewed by our team before going live.
TailorRegister.approvalNote: After registration, MOTD admin must approve your account before you can publish your shop and designs.
TailorRegister.successMessage: Thank you for applying. Your tailor account is awaiting MOTD admin approval. We'll notify you once your shop can go live.
TailorRegister.imageCaption: Master tailoring, presented to the world

FabricRegister.title: Fabric Store Registration
FabricRegister.description: Create your store owner account to publish premium fabrics and receive custom orders on MOTD. Your application will be reviewed by our team before going live.
FabricRegister.approvalNote: After registration, MOTD admin must approve your account before you can publish your store and catalog.
FabricRegister.successMessage: Thank you for applying. Your fabric vendor account is awaiting MOTD admin approval. We'll review your details shortly.
FabricRegister.imageCaption: Fine luxury fabrics, sourced from the finest looms

pending.title: Awaiting Approval
pending.description: Your fabric store account is under review by the MOTD team. You'll get access to store and fabric management once approved.

rejected.title: Application Not Approved
rejected.description: Unfortunately your fabric store application was not approved at this time.
rejected.contact: If you believe this was a mistake or would like more information, please contact the MOTD team.

dashboard.title: Welcome, {name}
dashboard.description: Manage your store profile and premium fabric catalog from here.

shop.createDescription: Set up your public fabric store profile. Name and slug are required; you can add descriptions, images, and contact details.
shop.editDescription: Update how customers see your fabric store on MOTD.
shop.successCreated: Your store profile was created successfully.
shop.successUpdated: Your store profile was updated successfully.
shop.imageSaved: Image saved to your store profile.

placeholders.name: e.g. Hanayan Fabrics
placeholders.description: Tell customers about your fabrics collection...

hints.slug: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Used in your public URL.
hints.logoUpload: Square store mark. Used when no cover image is set.
hints.coverUpload: Wide hero photo — shown on the homepage and your public profile.

validation.slugInvalid: Slug must use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
validation.phoneInvalid: Phone number must be exactly 9 digits.

errors.conflict: Store URL slug is already in use.

fabrics.title: Manage Fabrics
fabrics.description: Create, edit, and keep track of your fabric catalog inventory.
fabrics.empty: No fabrics found in your catalog yet.
fabrics.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
fabrics.shopRequiredDescription: Please set up your store profile first before managing your fabrics.
fabrics.editDescription: Update fabric details, inventory count, and color options.
fabrics.createDescription: Add a new luxury fabric to the MOTD marketplace.

hints.slug: Used in the public fabric details URL.

validation.slugInvalid: Slug must use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
validation.imagesRequired: At least one image is required.
validation.stockInMetersInvalid: Please enter a valid stock amount.

errors.conflict: Fabric slug is already in use.

orders.title: Fabric Orders
orders.subtitle: Track, view, and fulfill custom garment fabric orders from your store.
orders.loadError: Failed to load fabric orders. Please try again.
orders.empty: No custom fabric orders placed from your store yet.

orders.title: Custom Orders
orders.subtitle: Track, view, and fulfill custom garment orders assigned to your shop.
orders.loadError: Failed to load custom orders. Please try again.
orders.empty: No custom orders assigned to your shop yet.
orders.notePlaceholder: Add a production log or note...

pending.title: Awaiting Approval
pending.description: Your tailor account is under review by the MOTD team. You'll get access to shop and design management once approved.

rejected.title: Application Not Approved
rejected.description: Unfortunately your tailor application was not approved at this time.
rejected.contact: If you believe this was a mistake or would like more information, please contact the MOTD team.

shop.editDescription: Update how customers see your shop on MOTD.

shop.successUpdated: Your shop profile was updated successfully.
shop.imageSaved: Image saved to your shop profile.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load your shop profile.

designs.title: Your designs
designs.description: Create and manage the designs customers can order from your shop.
designs.empty: You have not published any designs yet.
designs.createDescription: Add a new design listing for your tailor shop.
designs.editDescription: Update pricing, images, and visibility for this design.
designs.shopRequiredDescription: You need a shop profile before you can add designs.

hints.slug: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

validation.slugInvalid: Slug must use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
validation.imagesRequired: At least one image is required.
validation.basePriceInvalid: Base price must be zero or greater.
validation.tailoringFeeInvalid: Tailoring fee must be zero or greater.
validation.estimatedMetersInvalid: Estimated meters must be greater than zero.
validation.estimatedDaysInvalid: Estimated days must be at least 1.

errors.conflict: This design slug already exists for your shop.

community.title: Join Our Community
community.description: A curated network for master tailors and textile houses — where craftsmanship meets modern presentation and global visibility.

newsletter.title: Elegance in Your Inbox
newsletter.description: Receive seasonal fabric releases, atelier stories, and curated craftsmanship highlights — delivered sparingly, only when it matters.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.subtitle: Return requests and other admin alerts.
Notifications.returnAccepted: Return request accepted. Customer will be notified.
Notifications.returnReviewHint: Admin approval will notify the customer dashboard.
Notifications.refundReviewHint: Process the refund after verifying the returned item.
Notifications.workflowRejected: Return was rejected at the refund step.
Notifications.markAllFailed: Failed to mark all as read

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.subtitle: Updates about your orders and returns.
Notifications.emptyDescription: You'll receive updates here when your orders are confirmed, shipped, or delivered, when return requests are processed, and when refunds are issued.
Notifications.markAllFailed: Failed to mark all as read

OrdersPage.title: Your Orders
OrdersPage.description: Track ready-made purchases and custom tailoring orders in one place.

custom.emptyDescription: Start a custom tailoring order to see it tracked here.

retail.emptyDescription: Browse size-return ready-made pieces on the homepage.

Footer.tagline: Bespoke Eastern luxury tailored for the modern world.
Footer.description: A refined destination connecting discerning clients with exceptional fabrics, master tailoring houses, and elevated craftsmanship inspired by contemporary Gulf elegance.
